tasks.dev: NODE_ENV=development PORT=3000 PUBLIC_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 TRUSTED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173,http://127.0.0.1:5173 deno run --watch --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-ffi src/index.ts
tasks.build: deno check . && mkdir -p dist && deno cache src/index.ts && touch dist/server-cache-ok
